entity.label: Hananiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The “ruler of the palace; he was a faithful man, and feared God above many” (Neh. 7:2).

nodes.label: Hananiah
nodes.description: The “ruler of the palace; he was a faithful man, and feared God above many” (Neh. 7:2).

verses.text: That I gave my brother Hanani, and Hananiah the ruler of the palace, charge over Jerusalem: for he was a faithful man, and feared God above many.
